headline: Corteva (CTVA) Valuation Check As Shares Trade At A Modest Discount To Fair Value Estimates
summary: Key recent stock performance Corteva (CTVA) has seen mixed share performance recently, with a 0.4% move over the past day, a 1.9% decline over the past week, and a 1.2% decline over the past month. See our latest analysis for Corteva. Zooming out, Corteva’s recent pullback sits against a stronger trend, with an 11.1% 90-day share price return and a 30.3% 1-year total shareholder return suggesting changing sentiment around its growth and risk profile. headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Corteva, Raises Price Target to $95
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Arun Viswanathan   maintains Corteva (NYSE:CTVA) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $89 to $95.
